summary: Frontend-only testing of BussySport landing page. All 15 specified features tested and passed.

integration_issues.issue: contact.php not executable in Node.js test env (MOCKED - expected behavior, works in prod FTP/PHP)

critical_code_review_comments: contact.php PHP mail handler is MOCKED in this Node.js test environment - functional only in production FTP/PHP deployment
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure HTML/CSS landing page served by Node.js static server. All 15 features verified: navbar, hero, about, 4 activity cards, banner, contact form, email, social icons, footer, mobile hamburger menu, smooth scroll, form validation, background images on cards, SEO meta tags.

test_results.1_page_loads: PASS - Title: BussySport – Association Sportive à Bussigny | 1030 Vaud, Suisse
test_results.2_navbar: PASS - Logo BussySport visible, Notre Association/Activités/Contact links, Rejoindre button
test_results.3_hero_section: PASS - 'Le Sport, Notre Passion. Votre Communauté.' visible with CTA buttons
test_results.5_activity_cards: PASS - Courses à Pied, Cross-Training, Street Workout, Tournois all found
test_results.6_banner: PASS - 'D'autres activités arrivent dans les mois à venir' visible
test_results.7_contact_form: PASS - 4 form fields found (nom, email, sujet, message) + submit button
test_results.9_social_icons: PASS - Instagram and Facebook links present
test_results.11_mobile_hamburger: PASS - Hamburger visible on mobile (390px), click opens mobile menu with all nav links
test_results.12_smooth_scroll: PASS - Clicking nav link scrolls page (scrollY=1983)
test_results.13_form_validation: PASS - Empty submit shows 'Veuillez remplir tous les champs obligatoires.' + 4 HTML5 invalid fields
test_results.14_activity_images: PASS - Background images on activity cards
